title: corchorus stenophyllus
intro: Corchorus stenophyllus, also known as the narrow-leaved jute, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting immunomodulatory effects. Corchorus stenophyllus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as poultices or salves.
